title: tooling: add post-merge CI audit helper
notes: Added a read-only post-merge main CI audit helper. The script polls GitHub Actions workflow runs for a main-branch head SHA, checks that the three required workflows (CI, Edge Discovery audit tests, WFA) all produced success runs, and emits a JSON+Markdown audit packet. human_cleanup_required=true because Codex raised P2 review threads that required manual stale-thread resolution before merge.
